name: Session Hijacking / Token Theft Actors
description: Session Hijacking and Token Theft Actors gain access by stealing active authentication sessions rather than passwords. They target browser cookies, session tokens, refresh tokens, OAuth tokens, SSO sessions, and federated cloud credentials to bypa...
strategic_objectives: Obtain trusted access without needing passwords or repeated
Bypass identity protections by replaying valid authenticated
Maintain mailbox and cloud access through stolen tokens
